title: Gemini CLI: Analyzing Images and Mixed-Media Documents
description: Use Gemini CLI's multimodal capabilities to analyze images, extract text from screenshots, and process documents containing mixed media.

resources.title: Gemini API Multimodal Guide
resources.description: How to pass images, audio, and video to Gemini models via the API

resources.title: Gemini CLI File Support
resources.description: Supported file types and how to pass media files to Gemini CLI

resources.title: Analyze a screenshot with Gemini CLI
resources.description: Pass an image to Gemini CLI and extract structured information from it
resources.command: gemini 'Describe all UI elements visible in this screenshot and list any text you can read' --file screenshot.png

resources.title: Gemini CLI Multimodal Analysis Tutorial
resources.search_keyword: Gemini CLI multimodal image analysis tutorial 2026

quiz.question: What does multimodal mean in the context of Gemini CLI?
options: Working with text plus media like images
quiz.explanation: Multimodal analysis means the tool can work with more than plain text, such as screenshots and mixed-media files.

quiz.question: What is a practical example from this lesson?
options: Extracting UI details from a screenshot
quiz.explanation: The lesson shows using Gemini CLI to inspect screenshots and extract visible text and UI details.

quiz.question: Why is structured extraction useful?
options: Because it makes outputs easier to reuse in workflows
Because it hides all input data
Because it removes the need for prompts
quiz.explanation: Structured extraction helps learners reuse the output in later analysis, reports, or automation steps.

practicePrompts.label: Extract Text from Image
practicePrompts.instruction: Use Gemini CLI to extract text from an image.
practicePrompts.prompt: Pass an image of a document to Gemini CLI and extract the text content from it.
practicePrompts.followUp: Try passing a different image with mixed media elements.

practicePrompts.label: Analyze Mixed Media
practicePrompts.instruction: Analyze a mixed media document using Gemini CLI.
practicePrompts.prompt: Provide a mixed media document to Gemini CLI and analyze its contents for structured information.
practicePrompts.followUp: Experiment with a document that has varying layouts and formats.

practicePrompts.label: Image Metadata Extraction
practicePrompts.instruction: Extract metadata from an image file.
practicePrompts.prompt: Upload an image to Gemini CLI and extract its metadata, including dimensions and file type.
practicePrompts.followUp: Test with images of different formats and sizes to see how the metadata varies.
